367.rule: Fill the black interiors of two to four hollow gray rectangles yellow while preserving gray rectangle borders and gray connector lines; grids are 10..20 and a rectangle may be clipped by one column at the left or right edge.

382.rule: Starting from red boundary markers and cyan boundary seeds, extend each cyan seed across the grid and shift it perpendicular to the boundary by the cumulative count of passed red markers; horizontal flip and four gravity orientations cover the eight orientations.

270.rule: On the fixed 15x15 grid, preserve the two flower centers (colors 2 and 1) and move each present remote petal (colors 3 and 7) inward to the adjacent cardinal cell around its own center; absent or colliding petals remain omitted.
